mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO merchant_daily_stats (merchant_id, stat_date, revenue, order_count, refund_amount, verified_count, verified_amount) VALUES
(#{item.merchantId}, #{item.statDate}, #{item.revenue}, #{item.orderCount}, #{item.refundAmount}, #{item.verifiedCount}, #{item.verifiedAmount})
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE revenue = VALUES(revenue), order_count = VALUES(order_count), refund_amount = VALUES(refund_amount), verified_count = VALUES(verified_count), verified_amount = VALUES(verified_amount)
